title: Nursing Facilities * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Nursing Facilities * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER CENTER FOR MEDICALLY FRAGILE CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 24-hour nursing care for children, including short-term stays, medical evaluation and treatment, recovery after surgery or illness, and respite care. Also offers long-term care with team-based care planning and coordination. 830 NE 47th Avenue Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 21 and younger with complex medical needs requiring 24-hour skilled nursing care Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 215-2837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON CENTER FOR MEDICALLY FRAGILE CHILDREN
